{ "name": "paypal/paypal-checkout-sdk", "description": "PayPal's PHP SDK for Checkout REST APIs", "keywords": ["paypal", "payments", "rest", "sdk", "orders", "checkout"], "type": "library", "license": "https://github.com/paypal/Checkout-PHP-SDK/blob/master/LICENSE", "homepage": "http://github.com/paypal/Checkout-PHP-SDK/", "require": { "paypal/paypalhttp": "1.0.1" }, "authors": [ { "name": "PayPal", "homepage": "https://github.com/paypal/Checkout-PHP-SDK/contributors" } ], "require-dev": { "phpunit/phpunit": "^5.7" }, "autoload": { "psr-4": { "PayPalCheckoutSdk\\": "lib/PayPalCheckoutSdk", "Sample\\":"samples/" } }, "autoload-dev": { "psr-4": { "Test\\":"tests/" } }, "scripts": { "unit": "phpunit --testsuite unit", "integration": "phpunit --testsuite integration" } }
